gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Age > 65, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score > 5
pred_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Age > 65, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score > 5
question: Among the posts with a score of over 5, what is the percentage of them being owned by an elder user?
